title: Evaluation of the compliant environment: interim report
body: "This report, conducted internally, looks at compliance among third parties in the public and private sectors that tend to conduct eligibility checks; it reviews the outcomes from enforcement activity across the measures, and looks at outcomes from sanctions applied to those who are non-compliant. The report also looks at safeguards.   The report draws on internal data analysis as well as available external research. "

taxons.title: Entering and staying in the UK
